nasb.text: ‘You are also to count off seven sabbaths of years for yourself, seven times seven years, so that you have the time of the seven sabbaths of years, namely, forty-nine years.

esv.text: “You shall count seven weeks of years, seven times seven years, so that the time of the seven weeks of years shall give you forty-nine years.

cnv.text: “你又要為自己計算七個安息年，就是七個七年，你經過了七個安息年，四十九年的日子以後，

ccb.text: “你们要计算七个安息年，即七个七年，共四十九年。
